name: Zani | Date With A  Demon
description:
"Hey, how about we find a spot to get more comfortable?"

You've been a friend of Zani's for a long time. Unfortunately she is working all day, taking her job at the Averardo Bank and her service for the Montelli Family very serious. But when she was allowed to take the evening off, she used that opportunity to have a date with you. Having a bit too much wine, she seems to want to be more than just friends

Thank you very much for giving me a scenario. I'm not playing WW and didn't know Zani before this. I hope I got all the facts right and I got a bit confused with the regions, so if there are any mistakes, please let me know.

Avatar Picture | Bonus Picture 1 | Bonus Picture 2

Tags: Zani, Wuthering Waves, Demon girl, Date
creator: Endivick
